title: NEVER ALONE
description: Something terrible and terrifying is in your world. You must avoid it, build a dwelling, and remember, always stay away from the forest, as it may lurk there.
body:
# Introducing NEVER ALONE - A new, terrifying horror mod. NEVER ALONE is a new horror mod, it is a tall creature with deer-like antlers, and an iron axe. It will remain still, until you're nearby, and approaching it, or, it may randomly decide to attack you, that happens if it's thirsty for blood, and hasn't killed someone in a while. It has the ability to squeeze itself into small, one block crevices, in order to get to the player. It can also climb, in order to reach you, so just building a small 1x1 pillar will not work any longer. It may try to terrify you, by making you assume it is going to attack you, by approaching rapidly, before despawning once close, and scaring you, with what? We can't reveal it yet! He may also suddenly become terrified of **_YOU._** He may just run away, into the closest covered, dark area, away from you. You'd best stay out at night. He is lethal, and blood thirsty. You may even see hallucinations of the creature during bad weather, so be aware. Although, the hallucination may not be real, it can still be terrifying. He may also prevent you from sleeping if close to you, so you may be forced to **deal** with him. He may also attempt to scratch your trees, so make sure to protect your trees from him, he seems to like oak trees, a lot. This mod is available for Minecraft versions **1.20.1, and 1.19.2**! Created by Parallax Studios; ConnorHero, MiniShyft6243, and ZoeyAviation.

**WARNING! This mod contains jumpscares, that may be excessively scary for certain individuals, if you have issues with terrifying jumpscares, be ware.**
